name: What evidence do coworkers provide for my toxic dust claim?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do coworkers provide for my toxic dust claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Confirm hazards, your symptoms, no PPE.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Statements confirming exposure conditions, lack of safety measures, your symptoms.**

Affidavits detail shared hazards, PPE issues[1][3]. Strengthens causation.

- Dates, tasks, chemicals seen.
- No protection provided.
- Your health complaints.

Get written statements early; attorney notarizes. Corroborates records[1].

description: Confirm hazards, your symptoms, no PPE.
